mapper.select: SELECT device.id, device.device_name, device.device_date, device.device_price, device.guarantee, device.device_factory, lab.lab_name FROM lab_device device LEFT JOIN lab_sub lab ON device.lab_id = lab.id WHERE device.is_deleted = 0 AND lab.is_deleted = 0

WITH RECURSIVE DateSeries AS ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AS date UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM DateSeries WHERE date < CURDATE() ) SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(ld.create_time), 0) AS device_count FROM DateSeries ds LEFT JOIN lab_device_repair ld ON ds.date = DATE(ld.create_time) WHERE ds.date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND ld.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY ds.date ORDER BY ds.date;
